chunks.text: Staff Contact Quick List - EECS at Berkeley Staff Contact Quick List Student Affairs Contacts gradadmissions@eecs.berkeley.edu Prospective graduate student (except MEng program) advising/assistance (admissions, applications, and requirements). mengadmissions@eecs.berkeley.edu Prospective EECS Master of Engineering (MEng) student advising/assistance (admissions, applications, and requirements). Berkeley Office of Undergraduate Admissions Advising for students to who want to apply to UC Berkeley to study EECS or CS. prospective-ugradstudents@eecs.berkeley.edu Advising for prospective undergraduates who want to major in EECS or LS CS (preparation for the major, major requirements, etc.) grads-cs@berkeley.edu All current CS graduate student advising/assistance grads-ee@berkeley.edu All current EE graduate student advising/assistance eecs-advising@eecs.berkeley.edu EECS/EE undergraduate student advising/assistance. cs-advising@eecs.berkeley.edu L&S CS undergraduate student advising/assistance. diversity@eecs.berkeley.edu All diversity and outreach-related questions. Center for Student Affairs List of services provided by the CSA Cory & Soda Hall Contacts Card Key / Key Request Form - Long Term (CalNet Authentication required) Long-term key and card key access request form. Report a Card Key Access Problem keys@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about keys and card keys. Building maintenance request form Room Reservations Reserve meeting rooms in Cory and Soda, view occupancy and schedules. eecsoffice@eecs.berkeley.edu Cory Hall visitor information, lost & found, parking, surface mail. cory-building@eecs.berkeley.edu Cory Hall building questions/requests (safety, space, etc.). csoffice@cs.berkeley.edu Soda Hall visitor information, lost & found, parking, surface mail. soda-building@eecs.berkeley.edu Soda Hall building questions/requests (safety, space, etc.). esg@eecs.berkeley.edu Instructional labs and audio visual facilities. copiers-printers@eecs.berkeley.edu Report problems with PUBLIC printers and copiers. Problems with group and lab printers should be reported to that group's IT support. Faculty Support Contacts eecs-chair@eecs.berkeley.edu

Hall visitor information, lost & found, parking, surface mail. soda-building@eecs.berkeley.edu Soda Hall building questions/requests (safety, space, etc.). esg@eecs.berkeley.edu Instructional labs and audio visual facilities. copiers-printers@eecs.berkeley.edu Report problems with PUBLIC printers and copiers. Problems with group and lab printers should be reported to that group's IT support. Faculty Support Contacts eecs-chair@eecs.berkeley.edu All communication with and about the EE and CS Chairs. faculty-award@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty award information and updates. acad-personnel@eecs.berkeley.edu Academic personnel (merits, promotions, leave, recruitment, benefits, faculty polices, etc.) eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty information updates (change in room number, assistants, etc.). Course Support Contacts ee-scheduling@eecs.berkeley.edu EE class scheduling in Cory Hall cs-scheduling@eecs.berkeley.edu CS class scheduling in Soda Hall. cs-enrollments@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about enrolling in CS classes. eecs-course-support@eecs.berkeley.edu All administrative course support questions and requests (copying, textbooks, eGrade submissions, etc.) eecs-course-management@eecs.berkeley.edu Management of undergraduate student instructors and courses. inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Instructional computing (class accounts, instructional websites) IT Support Contacts See separate box for Website Contacts. help@eecs.berkeley.edu Computing services and networks in Cory, Soda, Sutardja Dai, and Jacobs Halls. inst@eecs.berkeley.edu EECS instructional and computer lab support. esg@eecs.berkeley.edu Electronics labs and A/V support. acg@eecs.berkeley.edu Databases and departmental administrative staff support. IRIS information Help and news for departmental computing infrastructure: networks, home directories, project storage, print server, personal web pages. Website Support Contacts roster@eecs.berkeley.edu Online Directory updates (room, phone, and name changes). news@eecs.berkeley.edu Report news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff to include on the EECS home page (awards, media features, professional milestones, etc.) eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty home page corrections. webteam@eecs.berkeley.edu Departmental web sites and servers. Industrial & Public Relations Contacts

Website Support Contacts roster@eecs.berkeley.edu Online Directory updates (room, phone, and name changes). news@eecs.berkeley.edu Report news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff to include on the EECS home page (awards, media features, professional milestones, etc.) eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty home page corrections. webteam@eecs.berkeley.edu Departmental web sites and servers. Industrial & Public Relations Contacts public-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu Public relations, media, and general questions. gifts@eecs.berkeley.edu Gifts and donations to the department. news@eecs.berkeley.edu Report news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff to include on the EECS home page (awards, media features, milestones, etc.) alumni-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu bears-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) colloquium@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the EECS Joint Colloquium. cap-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the Corporate Access Programs (CAP). eab-admin@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about the External Advisory Board (EAB). Human Resources Contacts payroll@eecs.berkeley.edu All payroll and benefits -related questions. Research (ERSO) HR & Payroll eecs-visitor-coordinator@eecs.berkeley.edu Support for postdocs, invited visiting scholars/researchers, visiting industrial fellows. Financial Services Contacts accounting@eecs.berkeley.edu Purchasing, reimbursements, fund balances, card management, recharge/billing. Research Contracts & Grants View Open Faculty Positions
